title: Retry stdlib directory cleanup during CLI provisioning

source.subject: cli: retry stdlib directory cleanup during provisioning

body:
Retries **stdlib directory cleanup** during CLI provisioning when transient filesystem races caused flakes.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`0d88e26`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/0d88e26)
- **Subject:** cli: retry stdlib directory cleanup during provisioning
- **Completed:** 2026-04-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`

## Relation
Operational hardening for **corelib-packaging** provisioning.
